description.de: Zeigt, was du auf Nintendo Music hörst in deinem Discord-Profil an.
description.en: Shows what you're listening to on Nintendo Music on your Discord profile.
description.es: Muestra lo que estás escuchando en Nintendo Music en tu perfil de Discord.
description.it: Mostra ciò che stai ascoltando su Nintendo Music sul tuo profilo Discord.
description.nl: Laat op je Discord-Profiel zien wat je naar luistert op Nintendo Music.
description.ru: Показывает, что ты слушаешь в Nintendo Music через свой профиль Discord.

settings.description: Show the progress timestamps of a song.
settings.title: Show Timestamps

settings.description: Show the song artwork as the large image.
settings.title: Show Song Art
